catalog_notes: Session 6. Storage preset defaults for UI prefill. All capacity/power values are best-solve estimates (BEST-SOLVE-001). Research required before use in engineering trade. Spec §21, schema/storage/storage.schema.json.

entries.label: PCM Eutectic Store (Hot-Island Buffer)
entries.basis_note: Representative of Al-12%Si eutectic class (melting ~850K). 50kg assumed: latent ~28MJ + sensible ~2MJ. Charge/discharge limits estimated from thermal coupling class. All values BEST-SOLVE — see BEST-SOLVE-001.

entries.label: Sensible Refractory Store (High-Temp Buffer)
entries.basis_note: Representative of SiC class at 800-1600K. 100kg at cp~750 J/kgK, ΔT~300K = 22.5MJ. Charge/discharge symmetric for sensible store. All values BEST-SOLVE — see BEST-SOLVE-001.

entries.label: Custom (Operator-Specified)
entries.basis_note: All values must be specified by operator.
